answer:
Peter initially helps Ellie because he recognizes her as the runaway heiress and wants an exclusive story to get his job back as a newspaper reporter. He gives her a choice: help him with the story in exchange for his assistance in reuniting her with Westley, or he will reveal her location to her father. Thus, his motivation is professional gain rather than personal interest.  

\boxed{\text{Peter helps Ellie to get an exclusive story for his newspaper and to secure his job.}}
